mongodb: image: 'mongodb/mongodb-atlas-local:latest' environment: - MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME=${MONGODB_USERNAME:-} - MONGODB_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD=${MONGODB_PASSWORD:-} volumes: - 'sail-mongodb:/data/db' ports: - '${FORWARD_MONGODB_PORT:-27017}:27017' networks: - sail healthcheck: test: - CMD - mongosh - 'mongodb://localhost:27017/admin' - '--eval=db.runCommand({ping:1})' retries: 3 timeout: 5s
